models.title: Medicare’s new payment model is built for AI, and most of the tech world has no idea
models.summary: There is no governmental mechanism to pay for an AI agent that monitors a patient between visits, calls to check in, coordinates a housing referral, or makes sure someone picks up their medication. ACCESS creates that mechanism for the first time.
models.title_zh: Medicare的新支付模式是为人工智能而构建的，大多数科技世界都不知道
models.summary_zh: 没有政府机制来支付人工智能代理的费用，该代理可以在两次就诊、打电话办理入住手续、协调住宿推荐或确保有人取药之间监控患者。ACCESS首次创建了这种机制。
models.title_en: Medicare’s new payment model is built for AI, and most of the tech world has no idea
models.summary_en: There is no governmental mechanism to pay for an AI agent that monitors a patient between visits, calls to check in, coordinates a housing referral, or makes sure someone picks up their medication. ACCESS creates that mechanism for the first time.

models.title: Musk mulled handing OpenAI to his children, Altman testifies
models.summary: Altman said that Musk's focus on controlling the initial for-profit gave him pause because OpenAI was dedicated to keeping advanced AI out of the hands of a single person, and Altman, with his experience running the prominent startup accelerator Y Co
models.title_zh: 奥尔特曼作证说，马斯克考虑将OpenAI交给他的孩子们
models.summary_zh: 奥尔特曼说，马斯克专注于控制最初的营利性组织，这让他停顿了一下，因为OpenAI致力于将先进的人工智能从一个人手中夺走，而奥尔特曼则凭借其运营着名的创业加速器Y Co的经验
models.title_en: Musk mulled handing OpenAI to his children, Altman testifies
models.summary_en: Altman said that Musk's focus on controlling the initial for-profit gave him pause because OpenAI was dedicated to keeping advanced AI out of the hands of a single person, and Altman, with his experience running the prominent startup accelerator Y Co

models.title: Anthropic warns investors against secondary platforms offering access to its shares
models.summary: "Any sale or transfer of Anthropic stock, or any interest in Anthropic stock, offered by these firms is void and will not be recognized on our books and records," the company's support page reads.
models.title_zh: Anthropic警告投资者不要使用提供其股票访问权限的二级平台
models.summary_zh: “这些公司出售或转让的人类股票或对人类股票的任何权益都是无效的，不会在我们的账簿和记录中得到确认，”该公司的支持页面上写道。
models.title_en: Anthropic warns investors against secondary platforms offering access to its shares
models.summary_en: "Any sale or transfer of Anthropic stock, or any interest in Anthropic stock, offered by these firms is void and will not be recognized on our books and records," the company's support page reads.

models.title: Report: Google and SpaceX in talks to put data centers into orbit
models.summary: Google and SpaceX are in talks to build data centers in orbit, pitching space as the future home for AI compute, even as costs today remain far higher than on the ground.
models.title_zh: 报告：谷歌和SpaceX正在谈判将数据中心送入轨道
models.summary_zh: 谷歌和SpaceX正在谈判在轨道上建立数据中心，将空间作为人工智能计算的未来家园，即使今天的成本仍然远远高于地面。
models.title_en: Report: Google and SpaceX in talks to put data centers into orbit
models.summary_en: Google and SpaceX are in talks to build data centers in orbit, pitching space as the future home for AI compute, even as costs today remain far higher than on the ground.
